chapter_goal: Expose Griffiths transversality as a complex whose cohomology controls Hodge-locus and infinitesimal-invariant questions.
checks: toy Hodge-locus tangent dimension matches a kernel computation
lab: Modify the IVHS matrix and watch the predicted Hodge-locus tangent space grow or shrink.
library_routes: Matplotlib for block and tangent-space diagrams
pitfalls: forgetting that Hodge loci are cut out analytically
confusing infinitesimal invariants with global normal functions
proof_moves: turn the connection into a filtered complex
read transversality as a one-step drop
identify tangent spaces by annihilation conditions
visual_focus: A block matrix and tangent slice show which derivatives are horizontal and which cut out the Hodge locus.
